title: See the winning 2026 Images of Research
summary_en: This year’s winners span punk culture, a spider cadaver and a copper mine in Ecuador.
title_cn: 2026年度科研影像大赛获奖作品一览

title: Student ventures take center stage at UIC’s 2026 Blaze Venture Challenge
summary_en: Nearly 80 students participated in UIC’s campuswide pitch competition for early-stage, student-led ventures.
title_cn: 学生创业项目成为北京师范大学-香港浸会大学联合国际学院2026年“星火”创业挑战赛核心亮点

title: UIC scientists develop promising therapy for deadly lung condition
summary_en: New molecule restores lung function in acute respiratory distress syndrome.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校科学家研发出针对致命肺病的颇具应用前景的治疗方案

title: Meet UIC’s 2025-26 Rising Stars and Distinguished Researchers
summary_en: Annual awards honor 14 university researchers, staff for excellence, innovation and impact.
title_cn: 北京师范大学-香港浸会大学联合国际学院2025—2026学年新秀学者与杰出研究人员介绍
